RAG Integration Test Document

This document tests the RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) integration.

Key Information:
- Test ID: RAG-TEST-2024
- Document Type: Integration Test
- Features: Upload, Processing, RAG Search, AI Analysis
- Expected Behavior: Should be searchable via AI chat

Important Facts:
1. RAG systems combine document retrieval with AI generation
2. Documents are chunked and embedded for semantic search
3. AI can answer questions based on document content
4. The system should maintain document context

Test Queries to Try:
- "What is the test ID in the uploaded document?"
- "What features are being tested?"
- "How many important facts are listed?"

Technical Details:
- Document processing involves text extraction, chunking, and embedding generation
- Embeddings are stored in a vector database for similarity search
- The system uses hybrid search combining semantic and keyword matching
- AI models generate responses based on retrieved document chunks

Business Context:
This RAG test document simulates real-world business documents that would be uploaded to the system. It contains structured information that the AI should be able to extract and reason about when answering user questions.

Expected Test Results:
✓ Document uploads successfully
✓ Text is extracted and processed
✓ Document chunks are created and embedded
✓ AI can find and retrieve relevant information
✓ User queries return accurate, contextual responses
